steps.title: Rearrange to factor form
steps.content: Expand the left side and collect all $x$ terms on the left: $$x(r - 7) + 3 = 17x + 25$$ $$xr - 7x + 3 = 17x + 25$$ Move constants to the right and factor: $$xr - 7x - 17x = 22$$ $$x(r - 24) = 22$$

steps.title: Determine the condition for exactly one solution
steps.content:
A linear equation in the form $ax = b$ has:
  • Exactly one solution when $a eq 0$ (then $x = b/a$)
  • No solution when $a = 0$ and $b eq 0$
In our equation $x(r - 24) = 22$, the coefficient of $x$ is $(r - 24)$. For exactly one solution, we need $(r - 24) eq 0$, which means $r eq 24$.

steps.title: Identify which value violates the condition
steps.content: Check what happens when $r = 24$: the equation becomes $x(24 - 24) = 22$, or $0 = 22$. This is a false statement with no solution. Since the problem requires exactly one solution, $r$ cannot be 24. That matches choice D — D is correct.
